content.en:
"Found it!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Although the Stone Mountain Lord was in the depths of the Sword Dao Abyss that he could not reach, his copy talent was still detected, covering the Stone Mountain Lord, and instantly detected the Stone Mountain Lord's talent.

Mastery-level Flesh Ancestor!

"It turned out to be this ancestral endowment!" Ye Tian was a little surprised.

It's not that physical talent is impossible, but it's basically very low-grade, so it doesn't help you control the Supreme Legendary Body.

It was the first time Ye Tian had seen a mastery-level flesh body ancestor, which was very rare.

"It's no wonder that a Boundary River life like the Lord of Stone Mountain can control the Supreme Legendary Body so quickly, it turns out that it has a mastery-level flesh body ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time, Ye Tian had already completely copied this mastery-level flesh body ancestral endowment in his hands, and then quickly withdrew from the Sword Dao Yuan.

Next, this replica body practiced in this kendo abyss.

And with the mastery-level flesh body ancestor in hand, Ye Tian's other copy bodies and the main body naturally all possessed them, so he began to practice and control the supreme legendary body.

With this cultivation, Ye Tian was suddenly pleasantly surprised.

"19 It's many times easier to control the Supreme Legendary Body than it used to be!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this rate, it wouldn't be long before he became a half-step Eternal Master.

Even, the speed at which he became a half-step Eternal Master was much faster than that of the Stone Mountain Lord.

After all, the Lord of Stone Mountain only possessed a mastery-level physical body ancestor, and the others were quite ordinary.

And Ye Tian is different, his own comprehension doesn't know how many streets he has beaten the Lord of Stone Mountain, and he also has a large number of control-level ancestors, and now with the control-level physical body ancestors, he is naturally extremely demonic, far surpassing the Lord of Stone Mountain.

Practice!

Practice!

Practice!

Several of Ye Tian's copied bodies had fallen into penance, and they didn't go to the end of the realm to fight and sharpen.

Perhaps before, it was a good suggestion for the half-tooth master to suggest that Ye Tian go to the end of the realm to sharpen, but now it is a little unsuitable, after all, he has a mastery-level physical body ancestor, and he can become a half-step eternal controller first, and when his strength is strong, he can go to the end of the realm to hunt the half-step eternal master-level boundary river life.

Time passed slowly, and in a flash, thousands of years of boundary rivers passed.

"Supreme Legendary Body, control Sancheng!"

Ye Tian smiled.

At this moment, he clearly felt that his perception of the Boundary River Heaven and Earth had undergone a significant change, as if he could perceive the flow of the rules of the Boundary River Heaven and Earth, and perceive the change of the origin.

It is true that his physical body has not been strengthened too much, but the strength that can be exerted has reached a qualitative change, and the aura on his body has also changed significantly.

He has become a half-step eternal master.

At this level, he can even partially change his own rules, so that those who are lower in cultivation than himself cannot spy on his own reality and realm, just like the white-bearded old man.

Void Zone.

Ye Tian stood in the source sea, pierced through time and space at a glance, and saw the white-bearded old man of Xuyang Mountain, and the white-bearded old man also sensed Ye Tian's peeping, and immediately looked at it.

Look at each other.

At this time, the white-bearded old man was quite surprised.

"Endless Lord, congratulations on stepping into the half-step Eternal Master realm!"

The white-bearded old man was really surprised.

It would take too long for the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord to attack the half-step Eternal Master, even with the help of the Eternal Master.

How could Ye Tian break through to the half-step Eternal Controller realm so quickly, he was very puzzled.

However, he guessed that this should have something to do with Ye Tian breaking through the ninth level of the Half Tooth Ancient Tower.

Perhaps, Ye Tian got amazing benefits from there.

However, he guessed wrong.

Of course, Ye Tian would not explain to the white-bearded old man.

Ye Tian chatted with the white-bearded old man for a while, and then he broke off contact.

"The white-bearded old man has at least sixty percent of the supreme legendary body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This strength is extremely powerful among the half-step Eternal Controllers, and there is even a certain hope of impacting the Eternal Controllers, but with the cautious thoughts of the white-bearded old man, I am afraid that he will choose to attack the Eternal Controllers if he has at least to control the Supreme Legendary Body to more than seventy percent.

In Ye Tian's opinion, there is still a lot of hope for the white-bearded old man to become the eternal controller in the future.

......

After becoming a half-step Eternal Master, Ye Tian's strength was naturally much stronger than in the past.

In terms of real strength, it is no less than the silver-white giant ape I saw at the beginning, even if it is worse, it will not be too bad.

"My current strength is enough to kill the average half-step Eternal Master, it's time to go to the end of the realm again, hunt down the half-step Eternal Master-level Boundary River lifeforms, collect their essence blood, and cultivate the secret of swallowing, which is enough to make my physical body even stronger!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

A replica body of Ye Tian began to move at the end of the realm again, and he no longer had any interest in those weaker realm river lifeforms.

He only wanted to find those half-step Eternal Masters of the Realm River Life with a high life level, and he could only gain benefits by killing them.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a powerful Boundary River Life, whose strength was comparable to that of a half-step Eternal Master, but its aura was far inferior to Ye Tian.

"That's you!"

Ye Tian stared at the snake's Boundary River Life Secret Path.

"Thousand True Bodies!"

"Extreme Dao Sky Slashing Sword!"

Bang!!!!

Endless time and space shattered, and the terrifying sword aura directly penetrated the life of that boundary river.

Layers of space-time barriers appeared on the opponent's body, but they were all shattered by Ye Tian, and the sword qi shattered the opponent's body.

However, it was a half-step Eternal Master's combat power, so it was only severely wounded and dying, and it was not really dead.

But Ye Tian cast another three thousand Void 707 hands, directly tearing apart the life of this Boundary River, completely killing it.

"Once upon a time, when I saw such a boundary river life, I trembled, as if it was an existence that could not be looked at directly, but now I can easily kill it!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

The first time he saw a half-step Eternal Master-level Boundary River life, it was still in the Void Realm, and he spied on the terrifying creatures of the Black Silent Sea.

In fact, that creature was the half-step Eternal Master.

At the beginning, his strength was too weak, and as soon as he touched the Black Silent Sea, his body would be annihilated, but the life of the Horror Realm River could swim in the Black Silent Sea, and the difference in strength between the two sides could be imagined.

But now, if he wants to enter the Dark Sea, it will naturally be very easy.

After killing this Boundary River life, Ye Tian cast the secret of swallowing, directly devouring all the essence blood on his body, and immediately left here.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to hunt down weaker half-step Eternal Master-level Boundary River Lifeforms, and if he encountered a Boundary River Life that was stronger than himself, he would retreat and not fight the other party.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's physical body became stronger and stronger with the help of the Secret of Swallowing.

Gradually, the essence blood of the life of the half-step Eternal Master-level Boundary River was not of much help to him, and his physical body had grown to an extremely terrifying level.

And Ye Tian's strength is also much stronger than in the past, and he can be called the invincible combat power of the half-step Eternal Master. _
